subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast attained unto the Threshold of that Shrine which is sacred unto all the world and the envy of the most exalted Paradise!
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشرف بعتبه روضه مقدسه الارجاء غبطه الجنه العلیا حمد خدا را که بعون
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
